name: AACR 2026 schema A master JSON
what_it_solves: Master schema JSON that describes the AACR 2026 outreach schema (fields, controlled vocabularies, join keys).
how_it_solves: aacr2026_schema_a_master.json is the source-of-truth schema; GTM_SCHEMA_B_BRIDGE.md documents the bridge to schema B (GTM view).
why_it_exists: Prevents lead-tracker column drift by pinning schema in JSON; GTM consumers use schema B via the bridge, not the raw tracker.
